title: Convert an <%= for %> block to a HEEx :for attribute
prompt: Convert the body of the render/1 function to use the :for attribute instead of an <%= for item <- @items %> block. Write the result to lib/my_app_web/live/simple_list_live.ex. Target module MyAppWeb.SimpleListLive. Keep a <li> per item.
tier_rationale: Single-syntax swap with a known replacement. One of the most frequent 1.6->1.7 patterns.
